title: Ready USDC card halts non-EEA service after issuer change, users report
summary: Users reported losing access to Ready’s USDC card outside the EEA after a card provider change triggered rapid deactivation notices.

title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails
summary: CoinMENA will use Standard Chartered to strengthen fiat payment rails in the UAE, while Revolut reportedly secured central bank licenses ahead of a planned local launch.

title: Fed Needs to Monitor 'Historic' Capex Boom, Goldman's Kaplan Says
summary: Robert Kaplan, Goldman Sachs vice chair and former Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas president, says the US is in the midst of an "historic" capital spending boom driven by infrastructure for AI and computing power. He speaks during an interview on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks, Bonds, Dollar Churn in Countdown to Fed: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders gearing up for the Federal Reserve decision refrained from making big moves as they waited to see whether new Chair Kevin Warsh will validate bets on future rate hikes or lean against them.

title: Oman Launches Mandatory National Bitcoin Mining Pool in State-Backed Push for Regulatory Control

Bitcoin Magazine

title: 79% of Bitcoin Supply Now Locked by Long-Term Holders. Analyst Sees Bear Market Nearing Exhaustion
summary:

79% of Bitcoin Supply Now Locked by Long-Term Holders. Analyst Sees Bear Market Nearing Exhaustion

title: Senators Introduce Bipartisan Resolution Opposing SBF Pardon
summary: Senators Gallego and Lummis want the chamber on record that the FTX fraudster should get no clemency under any circumstances.

title: Morning Minute: Coinbase Pushes to Become 'Everything Exchange' With Stocks, Perps, and AI
summary: The wall between crypto and TradFi continues to break down as Coinbase ushers in non-crypto products.

title: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance raises $32 million Series A, says valuation grew 10x from seed
summary: CoinFund led the round, with Coinbase Ventures, Haun Ventures, Jump Capital, Paxos, Chainlink Labs and others participating.

title: Limitless CEO says no prediction market platform will dominate, citing perpetual futures precedent
summary: Limitless CEO CJ Hetherington tells Bernstein no platform will dominate prediction markets, sizing the institutional opportunity 10x sports.

title: Trump says US will not invest in $300bn fund for Iran
summary: US president’s pushback on reports of provision in peace deal comes after fierce bipartisan backlash

title: ‘Humiliation’: Trump battles claims his Iran deal is worse than Obama’s
summary: US president’s critics ask if concessions to Tehran in purported agreement were worth four months of war
